'''鈭歫-b-dh-g''' ('''kajabdhegoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:impallid|impallid]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-b-dh-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:impallid|impallid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歫-b-dh-g
|-
! Lemma
| kajabdhegoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijabdhegoko|thijabdhegoko]] || [[word:jijabdhegoko|jijabdhegoko]] || [[word:shijabdhegoko|shijabdhegoko]] || [[word:kijabdhegoko|kijabdhegoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujabdhegoko|thuthujabdhegoko]] || [[word:jujujabdhegoko|jujujabdhegoko]] || [[word:shushujabdhegoko|shushujabdhegoko]] || [[word:kukujabdhegoko|kukujabdhegoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
